message:
feat(node): add migration rewrite system with rollback support

Implements a comprehensive migration rewrite subsystem that enables
controlled, auditable schema and data migrations:

migration/mod.rs (+587 lines):
- MigrationRewriteAction: Defines rewrite operations (rename fields,
  transform values, merge/split columns) with validation
- MigrationRewriteEntry: Tracks individual rewrite steps with
  before/after snapshots for audit
- MigrationRollbackEntry: Captures rollback information so any
  rewrite can be reversed
- MigrationRewriteReport: Aggregates all rewrites into a structured
  report with success/failure counts and timing

main.rs (+88 lines):
- write_migration_report_file(): Serializes rewrite reports to disk
  with atomic write (write-then-rename) to prevent partial reports
- MigrateCommand::Rewrite: New CLI subcommand to execute rewrite
  plans from JSON definition files

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
